flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Kenyon College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (82.8% → 66.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kenyon College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($63.3k → $71.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kenyon College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($63.3k → $71.5k).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kenyon College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
